authselect-test-framework

Profile test guides

Examples taken from authselect system tests in src/tests/system/tests/. Shared tests that run on local, SSSD and winbind live in test_all_profiles.py; see Writing new tests for AnyProfile.

  • SSSD profile tests (test_sssd.py)
    • Marker and fixtures
    • Common pattern
      • with-mkhomedir
      • with-faillock
      • with-sudo
      • with-pamaccess
      • with-silent-lastlog
      • with-gssapi
      • with-group-merging
    • Skeleton tests
  • Winbind profile tests (test_winbind.py)
    • Marker and fixtures
    • Common pattern
      • with-mkhomedir
      • with-faillock
      • with-pamaccess
      • with-silent-lastlog
      • with-gssapi
    • SSSD vs winbind differences
    • Skeleton tests
